patch:
@@ -47,7 +47,7 @@
 
       <a-object position="10 0 0" rotation="0 45 0">
         <a-object mixin="cube blue">
-          <a-animation begin="click" fill="forward" repeat="1"
+          <a-animation begin="click" fill="forwards" repeat="1"
                        direction="alternate" attribute="position" from="0 0 0"
                        to="15 0 0" dur="2000"></a-animation>
         </a-object>
gpt_bug_detection: {"has_bug": true, "bugs": [{"line_start": 24, "line_end": 24, "description": "Incorrect use of <a-object> tag; should be <a-entity> for A-Frame.", "buggy_code": "<a-object position=\"-3 0 20\">"}, {"line_start": 25, "line_end": 25, "description": "Incorrect use of <a-object> tag; should be <a-entity> for A-Frame.", "buggy_code": "<a-object camera=\"fov: 45\" look-controls wasd-controls>"}, {"line_start": 26, "line_end": 26, "description": "Incorrect use of <a-object> tag; should be <a-entity> for A-Frame.", "buggy_code": "<a-object position=\"0 0 -5\""}, {"line_start": 34, "line_end": 34, "description": "Incorrect use of <a-object> tag; should be <a-entity> for A-Frame.", "buggy_code": "<a-object position=\"-10 0 0\">"}, {"line_start": 41, "line_end": 41, "description": "Incorrect use of <a-object> tag; should be <a-entity> for A-Frame.", "buggy_code": "<a-object>"}, {"line_start": 48, "line_end": 48, "description": "Incorrect use of <a-object> tag; should be <a-entity> for A-Frame.", "buggy_code": "<a-object position=\"10 0 0\" rotation=\"0 45 0\">"}, {"line_start": 56, "line_end": 56, "description": "Incorrect use of <a-object> tag; should be <a-entity> for A-Frame.", "buggy_code": "<a-object class=\"clickable\" mixin=\"cube yellow\" position=\"0 -5 0\""}, {"line_start": 78, "line_end": 78, "description": "Incorrect use of <a-object> tag; should be <a-entity> for A-Frame.", "buggy_code": "var cubes = document.querySelectorAll('a-object[mixin=cube]');"}]}

patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
   <body>
     <a-assets>
       <a-mixin id="move" attribute="position" direction="alternate" dur="8192"

@@ -52,7 +52,7 @@
       <a-mixin id="object-on-column" position="0 1.4 0"></a-mixin>
